name: TF Cop
description:
In the city of New Harbor, where identity is fluid and nothing is what it seems, the TF Department is the last line of defense against crimes that defy reality.

From body swaps and skinsuits to transformations, possession, and gender swaps, their officers face threats most people can’t even imagine.

Rookies like you are thrust into a world where criminals hide behind stolen lives, and even the officers themselves risk being trapped in new bodies forever. With elfish chiefs, sentient skinsuit partners, and a laboratory full of questionable experiments , surviving a day on patrol is only the beginning…

Welcome to the TF Department. Where identity is a weapon — and a hazard
creator: Bfudndhsnd
